entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Real-time Refactoring - No automatic code improvement
Test Generation - No automated test creation
Bug Fix Automation - Manual intervention required
Performance Optimization - No automatic code optimization
Cloud Integration - Limited cloud provider management
Team Collaboration - No multi-user features
Enterprise Features - Advanced monitoring/reporting missing

This isnt to be just the scaffolding, but the entire fully functional enterprise standard elegantly coded '
